title: Discovery of alternative polyadenylation dynamics from single cell types.
author: Ye C Lin J Li QQ
content: S-EPMC7200215 PMC7200215 Discovery of alternative polyadenylation dynamics from single cell types. Alternative polyadenylation (APA) occurs in the process of mRNA maturation by adding a poly(A) tail at different locations, resulting increased diversity of mRNA isoforms and contributing
